words.def: one or more recordings issued together; originally released on 12-inch phonograph records (usually with attractive record covers) and later on cassette audiotape and compact disc
words.zh: n. 相簿, 相簿；專輯, 影集（album的複數形式）

words.def: one or more recordings issued together; originally released on 12-inch phonograph records (usually with attractive record covers) and later on cassette audiotape and compact disc
words.zh: n. 貼上簿, 唱片套

words.def: a large sandwich made of a long crusty roll split lengthwise and filled with meats and cheese (and tomato and onion and lettuce and condiments); different names are used in different sections of the United States
words.zh: n. 補充人員, 部下, 潛水艇, 膠層, 訂戶, 傻子

words.def: a vehicle carrying many passengers; used for public transport
a workplace for the conduct of scientific research
words.zh: n. 實驗室, 研究室
